title: SmootherArmor
description: A simple resource pack that makes armor look smooth . Useful for PvP
body:
# Smooth Armor Textures
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/780eb691d2579d08fe9946785ec91e0ea7211d63_0.webp)
## Features :
1. Designed armor textures for a smoother, more PvP related appearance .
2. Compatible with vanilla armor sets .
3. Fully compatible with all resolutions (16x default)
4. Perfect for medieval, fantasy, or clean-themed packs
## Installation :
1. Download the .zip file for the resource pack.
2. Place it in your resourcepacks folder:`/.minecraft/resourcepacks/`
3. Launch Minecraft and activate the pack from the Resource Packs menu.
## Compatibility :
1. Minecraft Versions: 1.20+
2. Works with OptiFine, Iris, Sodium and vanilla Minecraft
2. No performance loss
## Credits :
Shaders used in the screenshot: [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
